case_title: RUBEN ALVAREZ PINEDA VS. RAUL VAZQUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY PINEDA, RUBEN ALVAREZ AS TO DEFENDANT VAZQUEZ, RAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED OCT-20-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VAZQUEZ, RAUL
